name: browser-agent-v2
description: Behavioral data collection extension for cognitive load research

notes.content-scripts: Chrome does not support ES module imports in content_scripts without a bundler. src/content/content_script.js is self-contained. To use the modular sources (scroll_tracker.js, activity_tracker.js, stimulus_ui.js) directly, add webpack or Rollup with entries for content_script.js.
notes.background: src/background/service_worker.js uses native ES module imports (manifest type:module) — no bundler needed.
notes.popup: src/popup/popup.html uses <script type=module> — no bundler needed.
notes.questionnaire: src/questionnaire/questionnaire.html uses <script type=module> — no bundler needed.
